title: Replace random StratifiedKFold with purged race-wise walk-forward CV
summary: `PitNextLap` uses a forward 1-lap horizon, so random folds likely leak adjacent-lap and same-race structure across train/valid.
rationale: `PitNextLap` uses a forward 1-lap horizon, so random folds likely leak adjacent-lap and same-race structure across train/valid. Public time-series guidance recommends purge/embargo when labels overlap in time; here the analogous risk is same `Year/Race/Driver` trajectories appearing on both sides of the split.
implementation_hint: Build folds by `Year,Race` or contiguous race blocks, keep lap order, and embargo at least one future lap for each `Year,Race,Driver` sequence around validation boundaries. Re-score existing feature sets under this CV before trusting any gain.
expected_effect: Usually lowers local CV first, but should improve leaderboard correlation and prevent overfitting to same-race patterns.
risk: If test is IID rather than future-like, stricter CV can understate achievable LB and slow iteration.
